title: KINGRACK 2 Step Ladder, Folding Ladder with Non-Slip and Wide Pedal, Small Ladder with Handle, Sturdy Steel Step Stool, Lightweight and Portable Step Ladder, Red
features: 【TRIANGLE SUPPORT】 This 2 step ladder entirely meet the daily needs of household climbing. Equipped with safety hand rail, it makes it open and close smoothly. Horseshoe shape rubber feet make larger contact area to ensure the stability

【SECURITY& STABILITY UPGRADE】 Step Ladder is designed with sturdy steel material and an oversized top platform that offers heel-to-toe foot support, eliminating foot pain and fatigue, and used safety lock design to fix the ladder. When you use it, simply push down the top pedal until the safety locking mechanism is automatically locked in place

【NON-SLIP PROTECTION & COMFY FEELING】 The step stool has wide pedals with a non-slip rubber pattern that offers heel-to-toe foot support. The 4 corners of the step ladder are made with a non-slip finish, it helps to increase stability, keeps safe during use and also protects your floor from scratches. Coupled with long handrails and soft sponge-covered handle. All designs will bring you a comfortable and stable climbing experience

【PORTABLE& SPACE-SAVING】 Assembled design makes it easy to open and fold, easy to store and transport. Easy to carry for using indoor or outdoor. Step stool can fold to just 5 cm W for storage. Folds compactly to fit in a narrow place-in your garage, under the bed or in a convenient corner

【FOLDABLE & WIDE USAGE】 Folding and lightweight features for easy storage and transport. Good for cleaning,painting,washing windows and so on. Perfect for little height in the home,kitchen, shop,office, bathroom, garage, also can be used as a Chair or put plant on it as a decoretion furniture
